narrative:
Johan Manzambi is a central midfielder for Switzerland, currently boasting an overall rating of 7.13/10. This places him in the top 6% of central midfields at this tournament. His rating range, reflecting the match sample size, sits between 6.7 and 7.56.

Manzambi has been exceptionally productive this World Cup, scoring 1.35 goals per 90 minutes and providing 0.9 assists per 90 minutes across 200 minutes played. This output significantly exceeds his expected goals of 0.347 per 90 and expected assists of 0.144 per 90 at the tournament. His club form shows 0.228 goals and 0.173 assists per 90, highlighting his current explosive tournament impact.

Manzambi is currently a pivotal attacking force for Switzerland, directly contributing to goals and assists at a high rate. Scouts and fans should observe if he can maintain his exceptional 1.35 goals and 0.9 assists per 90 minutes. His continued high output will be crucial for his national team's progress in the tournament.
